Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication
Video.title: Junkyard Tow Truck

Video.summary: A 50 year old tow truck gets a newly fabricated rear chassis to return it to its former glory.
Video.title: Crippling Rust Repair

Video.summary: We pump up the power on our Junkyard Find Tow Truck.
Video.title: Filling the Void

Video.summary: An interior dress-up for a 50 year old tow truck giving it new life on the road.
Video.title: The Patina Polish

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are building the ultimate kayak vehicle, a Nissan Frontier Pro 4X, in one month.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Video.summary: Under a tight deadline for SEMA, Chris and Eric are scrambling to finish their Nissan Frontier.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: We bring in an old 1984 Chevrolet Land Yacht to give it some custom touches for some family fun.
Video.title: Cruisin' Caprice Wagon

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: We take a 2008 Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser and turn it into a budget-friendly Spec Panther racing
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Video.summary: We continue work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: We build the foundation of a stroker LS that would be a PERFECT fit for a hot rod!
Video.title: Pro LS Bottom End Build

Video.summary: We complete our stroker LS powerplant and put it to the ultimate performance test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Pro LS on the Dyno

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.summary: How to fit panels on a classic Chevelle, as well as repairing cracked or broken fiberglass
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: LT and Austin start the teardown process and make some upgrade decisions for Project Lo ‘n Slo.
Video.title: ’65 Chevy C10 Teardown

Video.summary: The '65 C10 Fleetside gets a coilover conversion that will slam her to the ground!
Video.title: Lo'n Slo Suspension

Video.summary: We buy a ’02 Sierra on the cheap and turn it into a reliable, powerful daily driver.
Video.title: GMC Sierra Old School Build

Video.summary: We trash the factory Gov-lock rear for a true posi to get both tires spinning.
Video.title: Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra

Image.alt: Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra
Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra
Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra

Video.summary: After a year in the shop, the turbo powered 292 straight-six is broken in and hits the road and the track.
Video.title: ’65 C10 Wrap Up

Video.summary: Our C10 project breaks tradition by ditching its rotted wood bed floor for an easy install aluminum kit.
Video.title: Installing an Aluminum Bed Floor Kit in a Chevy C10

Installing an Aluminum Bed Floor Kit in a Chevy C10

Video.summary: We take a 3 decade old military M530C fire truck, gut it, and turn it into a bobbed deuce.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part I

Video.summary: Our military deuce is turned into a customized 4x4 truck with improved suspension and load capacity.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part II
